<li><span style="font-size: 16px">Model in </span><span style="font-size: 16px">not the sof</span><span style="font-size: 16px">tware</span><span style="font-size: 16px"> / str</span><span style="font-size: 16px">ucture in </span><span style="font-size: 16px">the model</span><span style="font-size: 16px">, </span><span style="font-size: 16px">attributes do yo</span><span style="font-size: 16px">u control</span><span style="font-size: 16px"> and which </span><span style="font-size: 16px">one</span><span style="font-size: 16px">Ős you </span><span style="font-size: 16px">donŐt. </span><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></li>
